AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Building a Context-Folding LLM Agent for Long-Horizon Reasoning with Memory Compression and Tool Use
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article details the development of a context-folding LLM agent designed for long-horizon reasoning. It explores techniques such as memory compression and tool use to enhance the agent's capabilities.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Meta AI’s ‘Early Experience’ Trains Language Agents without Rewards—and Outperforms Imitation Learning
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Meta AI introduces 'Early Experience,' a new method for training language agents that foregoes traditional rewards, demonstrating superior performance compared to imitation learning techniques. This approach potentially revolutionizes how autonomous language agents acquire skills.

Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Coinbase has re-entered the Indian market with a substantial $2.45 billion investment into the local crypto exchange CoinDCX. This move signifies a major funding injection for CoinDCX and Coinbase's renewed focus on the region.

Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq and Citi have joined Mike Novogratz's Galaxy Digital in a funding round for Symbiont, a blockchain firm. This investment demonstrates significant institutional backing for enterprise blockchain solutions.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is utilizing Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) grants to fund the development of blockchain technology. This initiative supports blockchain innovation through government-backed programs.

Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are planning to implement a blockchain-based funding system for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) to enhance credit assessment and reduce defaults. This initiative introduces a novel application of blockchain for financial services.
